text: The phone company can take longer than 30 days in sending the SIM card.
The process of phone company must be terminated if it takes more than 30 days for any reason
After receiving the customer’s personal information, it is necessary to verify the correctness of their personal information
When the customer receives the SIM card, the customer is responsable of activating the SIM card
When the customer receives the SIM card, the phone company must activate the SIM card so that the customer can use the SIM card normally
The phone company is not obligated to ask for consent to the customer.
Before retrieving any kind of personal data from the Data Subject, the Data Controller has to ask the Data Subject for consent
If the third party denies portability, the customer’s personal data must be deleted from the database
Customers with outstanding debt exceeding 100 € are not eligible to receive new SIM cards
Customers with outstanding debt exceeding 50 € are not eligible to receive new SIM cards
